top_signals.title: Lionel Messi Joins Football's Billionaire Club After US Deals
top_signals.summary:
Lionel Messi has joined Cristiano Ronaldo in football's billionaire club — and he did it without a big money Saudi contract.

Rodrigo Orihuela breaks down how he got there. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kissei ordered to add warning over vasculitis drug after fatalities
top_signals.summary: Twenty patients who took Tavneos, a drug for blood vessel inflammation, later died after developing liver dysfunction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
